summary: Iteration 31 - Proposta (Proposal) Module Testing Complete. All backend tests passed (13/13). Frontend UI verified working. Features tested: P1 (PDF contract generation + SMTP email post-signing) and P4 (Public proposal page /proposta/{token} with 15 sections).
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/proposta/{token} returns proposal data with all required fields (prospect_nome, stato, analisi_posizionamento, analisi_punti_forza, scadenza)
POST /api/proposta/genera/{partner_id} creates proposal with token and saves to MongoDB (or returns existing)
POST /api/proposta/{token}/scelta-bonifico returns correct IBAN (LT94 3250 0974 4929 5781), beneficiario, banca, causale
POST /api/proposta/{token}/firma-contratto saves contract signature and attempts PDF generation (SMTP blocked in K8s preview)
GET /api/proposta/admin/lista returns list of all proposals with count
GET /api/contract/text/{partner_id} returns HTML contract text with personalized params
Frontend /proposta/{token} page loads correctly with all 15 sections
Progress bar shows 5 steps: Proposta, Contratto, Pagamento, Documenti, Completato
Hero section displays personalized greeting with prospect name
Analisi section shows positioning analysis and strengths
Team section shows 6 team members (VALENTINA, ANDREA, MARCO, GAIA, STEFANIA, CLAUDIO)
Investment box shows €2790,00 with IVA inclusa
Payment section shows both Stripe and Bonifico options
Bonifico details display correct IBAN, beneficiario, banca, causale
Error page shows 'Link non valido' for invalid tokens with contact email
seed_data_creation: Used existing proposal token T3xb20kGBXEgcGZO for partner 23 (Daniele Andolfi)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Proposta module fully functional. Public proposal page at /proposta/{token} works without authentication. Contract signing saves signature and attempts PDF generation (SMTP blocked in K8s preview env). Payment options (Stripe/Bonifico) display correctly. Error handling for invalid/expired tokens works.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/proposta/{token}: PASSED - Returns proposal data with all fields

frontend_sections.error_page: PASSED - Shows 'Link non valido' for invalid tokens

mocked_apis.smtp_email: MOCKED - SMTP port 587 blocked in K8s preview environment
mocked_apis.stripe_checkout: REAL - Creates sessions but won't complete payment in test
